title: Realtime Speech Control Plane
subtitle: Keep speech evidence, realtime response, and external authority as separate layers.

nodes.label: Audio Stream
nodes.description: Microphone chunks, VAD events, timing, speaker cues, and device context.
nodes.evidence: Research digest: speech products start from a timed acoustic stream.

nodes.label: ASR Trace
nodes.description: Words, timestamps, confidence, domain vocabulary, and searchable logs.
nodes.evidence: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio ASR documentation.

nodes.label: Audio Reasoning
nodes.description: LALM context over speech, music, sound events, intent, and uncertainty.
nodes.evidence: Audio Flamingo Next and MOSS-Audio model cards.

nodes.label: Realtime Loop
nodes.description: Turn detection, live translation, interruption recovery, and speech output.

nodes.label: Tool Gateway
nodes.description: Validate tool arguments, permissions, confirmations, idempotency, and audit.
nodes.evidence: Research digest: external authority belongs outside the model loop.

edges.label: recognition
edges.evidence: ASR turns audio into text and timing publishing details.

edges.label: sound context
edges.evidence: Audio-language models reason over non-text acoustic cues.

edges.label: text evidence
edges.evidence: Transcript state supports response and audit.

edges.label: audio evidence
edges.evidence: Realtime response can use prosody, sound, and turn context.

edges.label: intent gate
edges.evidence: Tool calls need validation before external action.
